hero.subtitle: We are an elite web design team specializing in 3D interactive experiences, futuristic UI/UX, and AI-powered digital systems.
about.label: ABOUT B-20
about.heading: We build digital experiences that feel like stepping into the future.
about.body: B-20 is a specialized web design and development team operating at the intersection of cutting-edge 3D technology, AI-powered interfaces, and premium visual design. Every project we create is engineered to leave a lasting impression — immersive, interactive, and unmistakably modern.
team.label: THE TEAM
team.heading: Three Minds. One Vision.
services.label: WHAT WE DO
services.heading: Capabilities
services.dev.title: Web Development
services.dev.desc: Full-stack web applications built with modern frameworks. From responsive landing pages to complex SPAs with real-time features, API integrations, and database architecture.
services.design.title: UI/UX Design
services.design.desc: User-centered interface design that balances aesthetics with functionality. Wireframing, prototyping, interaction design, and design systems that scale across products and teams.
services.branding.title: Branding
services.branding.desc: Complete brand identity systems — logos, color palettes, typography, and visual guidelines that establish a cohesive and memorable brand presence across all touchpoints.
services.ai.title: AI Systems
services.ai.desc: Intelligent integrations powered by machine learning. Chatbots, recommendation engines, automated workflows, and AI-enhanced user experiences that adapt and learn.
projects.label: SELECTED WORK
projects.heading: Featured Projects
projects.1.title: Nexus Dashboard
projects.1.desc: A real-time analytics dashboard with 3D data visualizations and AI-powered insights for enterprise teams.
projects.2.title: Void Commerce
projects.2.desc: Premium e-commerce platform with immersive product showcases and seamless checkout flow.
projects.3.title: Neural Interface
projects.3.desc: AI command center with natural language processing and adaptive workflow automation.
contact.label: GET IN TOUCH
contact.heading: Let's Build the Future
contact.subtext: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it.
contact.name: Name
